title: T-051 — Disable Optimizer v2 Modal
prompt:
# T-051 — Disable Optimizer v2 Modal

PRD: `docs/prd/07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md` §17.1 PLE-013, §10.2 fallback.
UX/prototype refs are listed in `pipeline_inputs.scope_files`.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Add the destructive control for rolling back allergen optimizer v2.

## Implementation contract
Use shadcn Dialog/Button destructive variant; if shared css lacks danger style, fix through shared style task before relying on custom class.

ACP shape reminder: keep this task as one atomic implementation. Do not add ACP-owned fields. Keep local dependencies in `dependencies`; cross-module contracts in `cross_module_dependencies` are blockers/inputs, not ACP local task IDs.

pipeline_inputs.description: Implement admin-only type-to-confirm disable_v2_modal with audit reason and fallback rule display.
pipeline_inputs.details: Matches disable_v2_modal. Requires literal DISABLE and reason ≥10 chars; toggles Settings feature flag and emits optimizer.v2.disabled.

cross_module_dependencies.contract: Feature flag storage, rule registry fallback, audit log.

acceptance_criteria: Given the modal renders, then it has prototype parity with disable_v2_modal including title, warning copy, DISABLE input, reason textarea and destructive action layout.
Given input is not DISABLE or reason <10 chars, then submit is blocked with field errors.
Given admin confirms, then feature flag is disabled, audit log written, and optimizer.v2.disabled outbox emits.

Given the UI task is closed, when CLOSEOUT is recorded, then it includes Playwright trace artifacts plus screenshots/artifacts for prototype parity and error/empty/blocked states per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
test_strategy: RED RTL validation/RBAC tests and Server Action tests.
Run pnpm --filter web test scheduler/DisableV2Modal disable-v2-action.
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow Planner role to disable v2.
Do not hardcode fallback rule details; read registry.
pipeline_inputs.priority_normalization_note: Priority normalized to ACP convention bands on 2026-05-03; lower number means earlier execution.
ui_closeout_evidence: Desktop screenshot/artifact of the implemented surface compared 1:1 to prototype `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx:650-675` (structural, visual, and interaction parity).
Playwright trace artifact for the primary happy path and at least one error/blocked/permission-denied path.
Axe (or equivalent) accessibility result, or a documented blocker with rationale.
List of intentional deviations from the prototype/UX with reason (e.g. P2 gating, RBAC hide).
Reference parity expectations in `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` and translation notes in `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-planning-ext.md`.
